zh.lifeSummary: 當Effie Mae Colbroth於1864年4月24日出生在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福時，她的父親Hiram Colbroth33歲，母親Nancy Drew34歲。她於1879年10月5日與Benjamin Yerxa White II在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她在美國威斯康辛州索耶辛特 蕾克住了大約5年且於1920年住在美國俄勒岡州姆爾特諾馬布洛維爾。她去世於1921年1月26日在美國俄勒岡州姆爾特諾馬波特藍德享年56歲，埋葬在美國俄勒岡州姆爾特諾馬波特藍德林肯 梅莫利亞爾 帕克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Effie Mae Colbroth于1864年4月24日出生在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福时，她的父亲Hiram Colbroth33岁，母亲Nancy Drew34岁。她于1879年10月5日与Benjamin Yerxa White II在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可盧德洛福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她在美国威斯康辛州索耶辛特 蕾克住了大约5年且于1920年住在美国俄勒冈州姆爾特諾馬布洛維爾。她去世于1921年1月26日在美国俄勒冈州姆爾特諾馬波特藍德享年56岁，埋葬在美国俄勒冈州姆爾特諾馬波特藍德林肯 梅莫利亞爾 帕克。

nameMeanings.name: Effie
meanings: Scottish: A Scottish corruption of Euphemia.

nameMeanings.name: Mae
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akihiro, Ichiro, Kenichiro, Wakako, Yoshikazu.
Japanese (pronounced as two syllables): written 前 ‘front’ or ‘before’. It is not common in Japan. Some occurrences in America could be shortened versions of longer names beginning with this element.

variants.name: May
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name May, a pet form of Matthew (see Mayhew ).

English, Dutch, and German: from a personal name or nickname taken from the month of May (Middle English, Old French mai, Middle High German meie, from Latin Maius (mensis), from Maia, a minor Roman goddess of fertility). This name was sometimes bestowed on someone born or baptized in the month of May; it was also used to refer to someone of a sunny disposition, or who had some anecdotal connection with the month of May, such as owing a feudal obligation then. In England, this name was possibly also a pet form of Mary or Margaret. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Denmark.

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln is assassinated by John Wilkes Booth.

historicEvents.title: Married Women's Property Act
historicEvents.description: Married Women’s Property Act protected women’s rights protected property for women in Oregon upon the death of her husband.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Secretary of State - Oregon History: Chronology

historicEvents.title: The Great Gale of 1880
historicEvents.description: The Great Gale of 1880 was a severe snow and wind storm that devastated parts of Oregon and Washington on January 9, 1880. The extratropical cyclone caused tides to rise seven feet, gale force winds, and snow accumulations of up to 18 inches.

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: Sinking of USS Maine
historicEvents.description: During the Cuban War for Independence, the USS Maine had been sent to Havana to look out for the interests of the United States. On February 15, 1898, at approximately 21:40, an explosion on USS Maine was caused by roughly 5 long tons of powder. The front of the ship was demolished and the remains quickly sunk to the bottom of the ocean. 260 men lost their lives in the explosion itself, with at least six more dying afterwards from related injuries. The event kicked off an atmosphere of contention that would eventually lead to the Spanish-American War.

historicEvents.title: The BSA is Made
historicEvents.description: Being modeled after the Boy Scout Association in England, The Boy Scouts of America is a program for young teens to learn traits, life and social skills, and many other things to remind the public about the general act of service and kindness to others.

historicEvents.title: First U.S. Primary Elections Held
historicEvents.description: The first U.S. primary elections were held in Oregon in 1911.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Gazette-Times - Primary  education: How Oregon blazed the way for primary elections

en.lifeSummary: When Effie Mae Colbroth was born on 24 April 1864, in Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, United States, her father, Hiram Colbroth, was 33 and her mother, Nancy Drew, was 34. She married Benjamin Yerxa White II on 5 October 1879, in Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, United States for about 5 years and Brower, Multnomah, Oregon, United States in 1920. She died on 26 January 1921, in Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, United States, at the age of 56, and was buried in Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, United States.

fr.Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnom: Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Effie Mae Colbroth est née le 24 avril 1864, à Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Hiram Colbroth, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Nancy Drew, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Yerxa White II le 5 octobre 1879, à Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, États-Unis pendant environ 5 ans et à Brower, Multnomah, Oregon, États-Unis en 1920. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1921, à Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, États-Unis, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Effie Mae Colbroth am 24. April 1864 in Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hiram Colbroth 33 und ihre Mutter Nancy Drew 34. Sie hat am 5. Oktober 1879 in Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Benjamin Yerxa White II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie hat ungefähr 5 Jahre lang in Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und 1920 hat sie in Brower, Multnomah, Oregon, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1921 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Effie Mae Colbroth è nata il il 24 aprile 1864 nel Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Hiram Colbroth, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Nancy Drew, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Yerxa White II il 5 ottobre 1879, nel Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 5 anni e nel Brower, Multnomah, Oregon, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1920. Morì il 26 gennaio 1921, nel Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregon, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Effie Mae Colbrothが1864年4月24日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクルドロウで生まれた時，父Hiram Colbrothは33歳，母Nancy Drewは34歳であった。1879年10月5日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクルドロウでBenjamin Yerxa White IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州サウヤーサンド ラクに約5年間，1920年にはアメリカ合衆国オレゴン州ムルトノマーブロウエルに住んでいた。彼女は1921年1月26日にアメリカ合衆国オレゴン州ムルトノマーポルトランドで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国オレゴン州ムルトノマーポルトランドリンコルン メモーイアル パークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Effie Mae Colbroth(이)가 1864년 4월 24일 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 루들로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hiram Colbroth(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nancy Drew(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1879년 10월 5일 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 루들로에서 Benjamin Yerxa White II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 위스콘신 주 사w예르 상드 레이크에서 약 5년, 1920년도에 미국 오리건 주 뮐트노마 브라워에서 살았다. 그녀는 1921년 1월 26일 미국 오리건 주 뮐트노마 포틀랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 오리건 주 뮐트노마 포틀랜드 링코컨 모리앨 박에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Effie Mae Colbroth nasceu em 24 de abril de 1864, em Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Hiram Colbroth, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Nancy Drew, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Yerxa White II em 5 de outubro de 1879, em Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América por quase 5 anos e em Brower, Multnomah, Óregon, Estados Unidos da América em 1920. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1921, em Portland, Multnomah, Óregon, Estados Unidos da América, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Óregon, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Effie Mae Colbroth родилась 24 апреля 1864 г. в местности лудлоу, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Hiram Colbroth было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Nancy Drew, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Yerxa White II 5 октября 1879 г. в местности лудлоу, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности сэнд леик, савиир, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты около 5 лет и в местности броуир, мултномах, Орегон, Соединенные штаты в 1920 году. Она умерла 26 января 1921 г. в местности портланд, мултномах, Орегон, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности линколн меморяль парк, портланд, мултномах, Орегон, Соединенные штаты.

es.24 April 1864–26 January 1921: 24 de abril de 1864–26 de enero de 1921

es.Duluth, St. Louis, Minnesota, United Sta: Duluth, St. Louis, Minnesota, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Effie Mae Colbroth nació el 24 de abril de 1864, en Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Hiram Colbroth, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Nancy Drew, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Benjamin Yerxa White II el 5 de octubre de 1879, en Ludlow, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Sand Lake, Sawyer, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos durante unos 5 años y en Brower, Multnomah, Oregón, Estados Unidos en 1920. Murió el 26 de enero de 1921, en Portland, Multnomah, Oregón, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Lincoln Memorial Park, Portland, Multnomah, Oregón, Estados Unidos.
